item.title: scaffold.ts pre-creates cloud/ and security/ directories without mode 0700 — root cause of all cloud dir permission issues
item.intent: scaffold.ts must create cloud/ and security/ with mode 0700 at install time — these dirs hold API tokens and trust-mode config. All downstream permission fixes are moot if scaffold creates these dirs world-readable first.
item.description: src/build/installer/scaffold.ts scaffoldDirs() creates the full ~/.clawhq/ directory tree at install time. SCAFFOLD_DIRS includes 'security' and 'cloud' but both mkdirSync calls (line 57 for root, line 63 for subdirs) use no mode option, creating dirs at default 0755. Since mkdirSync with recursive:true does NOT change the mode of already-existing directories, all the per-file fixes (BUG-078, BUG-081, BUG-082, BUG-083) are ineffective on systems where scaffold has already run — cloud/ stays at 0755 regardless of what credentials.ts or discovery.ts pass. Fix: split SCAFFOLD_DIRS_SECRET = ['security', 'cloud'] and create those with { recursive: true, mode: DIR_MODE_SECRET }, all others with no mode. Also apply chmodSync to security/ and cloud/ after creation to fix existing installs. Import DIR_MODE_SECRET from config/defaults.js.
